summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi Growth & Technology 15% Structured Buffer ETF (QQMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of Invesco QQQ Trust up to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 15% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year
